subcodes.first_line: Say: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, inasmuch as Thou hast guided me unto Thy straight path and Thy mighty Announcement, and hast given me to drink [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا الهی بما هدیتنی الی صراطک المستقیم و نبئک العظیم و سقیتنی
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
